summary: The diff implements comprehensive logging for debugging admin access issues across backend initialization, isCallerAdmin method, and frontend admin route. However, REQ-68 (deployment configuration review) appears to have no implementation evidence in the provided diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Review the backend actor initialization arguments and canister deployment configuration to verify the admin token containing principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' is being passed correctly during deployment
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to deployment configuration files, dfx.json, or canister initialization arguments are visible in the diff. The requirement asks for review and verification of deployment configuration, but no such files or changes are present.

hallucinated_features.description: Addition of extensive URL parameter utility functions with logging in frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest focuses exclusively on adding diagnostic logging to existing admin authentication logic. The urlParams.ts utilities for extracting and storing URL/session parameters were not requested and go beyond debugging enhancements.

hallucinated_features.description: Creation of backend/migration.mo file with migration module
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement mentioned adding a migration module or migration-related code. The BuildRequest explicitly states 'Do not modify the single-actor backend architecture' as a constraint.
